JUDGE: RICHARD KOSSOW; CLERK:ECLAVERIA;REPORTER WAIVED 10:00AM: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PRESENT: PLFF'S COUNSEL KURT HUYSENTRUYT PRESENT WITH DEFTS NIKOLAY MGEBROV AND NINA MGEBROV NOT APPEARING - THIS IS A PROVE-UP OF THESE DEFENDANTS. (NOTE: PLFF'S COUNSEL INFORMED CLERK THAT OTHER DEFTS, HELENA MGEBROV(CASE SETTLED AS TO HER, HELENA), AND AS TO DEFT MICHAEL MGEBROV, DEFAULT HAD BEEN ENTERED) PLFF EXH 1 (RENTAL AGREEMENT), FOR ID PLFF EXH 2 (3-DAY NOTICE), FOR ID. NO PAYMENT HAS BEEN MADE SINCE SERVING THE 3-DAY NOTICE. PRAYER OF PLFF: FORFEITUE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT, RESTITUTION/POSS. OF PREMISES, TOTAL RENT AND DAMAGES IN AMOUNT OF $7,404.88 (REP. RENT DUE OF $4,216.98, & DAMAGES FOR 103 DAYS AT $30.96 PER DAY IN TOTAL DAMAGES OF $3,188.88), COST OF $199.25, AND ATTORNEY'S FEES OF $1075. GRANTED BY COURT. PLFF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN BY PLFF'S COUNSEL.
